# Template: AUDIT

**Context (required):** Read `docs/repo_context_minimal.md` first.

## Scope

- State artifact paths inspected (under `results/.../runs/...` only).
- Cite `docs/execution_failure_classification.md` if classifying run health.

## Output

- Findings list; soft issues -> append one row to `tables/agent_warnings_log.csv` (no blocking).
